basic_details.job_title: NIMHANS Senior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences has released the official notification for 1 Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D (Basic / Medical Sciences), One-year experience in Neuromuscular Diseases / Neurosciences
qualification.details: Ph.D (Basic / Medical Sciences) with One-year experience in Neuromuscular Diseases / Neurosciences

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.nimhans.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIMHANS Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the NIMHANS Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) recruitment is 06-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D in Basic or Medical Sciences with at least one year of experience in Neuromuscular Diseases or Neurosciences.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is in the pay scale of Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1,180/-, which includes 18% GST.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Eligibility Test (if necessary) followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted in offline mode by post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NIMHANS: http://www.nimhans.ac.in.
